ogTitle: Kurrimine Beach vs Kurumbul: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kurrimine Beach and Kurumbul.
heading: Kurrimine Beach vs Kurumbul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kurrimine Beach, Queensland and Kurumbul, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kurumbul has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Kurrimine Beach (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kurrimine Beach or Kurumbul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kurrimine Beach has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Kurumbul scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kurrimine Beach scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Kurumbul scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kurrimine Beach or Kurumbul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kurumbul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
